questionHtml:
The speed of sound in air is 340 m s−1 and in water it is 1500 m s−1.

Discuss whether the sound wave can enter the water.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1

critical angle =13° «from sin θc=3401500» ✓

the angle of incidence is greater than θc hence the sound can’t enter water ✓

 

ALTERNATIVE 2

sin θr=1500340sin 30° ✓

sine value greater than one hence the sound can’t enter water ✓

 

Conclusion must be justified, award [0] for BCA.

meta.title: The speed of sound in air is 340 m s−1 and in water it is 1500 m s−1. Discuss whether the sound wave can enter the water.
